form_name: Next Play - Fundamentals of AI Productivity Pre-Event Survey

payload.formName: Next Play - Fundamentals of AI Productivity Pre-Event Survey

questions.name: Are you a member of the Next Play community AND attending the Jan 29 Fundamentals of AI Productivity?
What AI tools or features are you currently using? (select all that apply)
value: Consumer (Chatbot) AI: ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, etc.
AI Search: Perplexity, ChatGPT, Gemini, etc.
B2B AI: Copilot, Harvey AI, Figma, etc.
Agentic AI: Claude Code, Manus, Zo.computer, etc.

questions.name: What's your biggest challenge with AI tools right now?
questions.value: I'm overwhelmed by all the options

questions.name: How would you describe your current AI usage?
questions.value: I use AI regularly but feel like I'm just scratching the surface

questions.name: How do you FEEL about AI right now?
What would make this session valuable for you?
questions.value: Simple tactics I can use immediately

questions.name: What are 1-3 repetitive, computer-based tasks that drain your energy and reduce your productivity?
How much time per week do you estimate you spend on repetitive computer tasks?
What's your current role or title?
What function or department do you work in?
How would you describe your current career stage?
